en: okay I told them I didn't care
She's forgetting me Who My daughter
ko: 날 잊어가고 있어. 누가? 내 딸이.

en: She's the reason you wanted to cross the bridge I just wanted to see
ko: 다리를 건너고 싶었던 이유가 그녀 때문이구나. 그냥 다시 한번

en: her again I never should have left Santa Cecilia
ko: 보고 싶었어. 산타 세실리아를 떠나지 말았어야 했는데.

en: I wish I could tell her that her papa was trying to come home That he loved her so much
ko: 아빠가 집에 가려고 했다고 말해주고 싶어. 너무나 사랑했다고.
